description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular profile. It is equipped with a collapsible stock, ergonomic pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine with visible markings. The upper receiver sports a full-length Picatinny rail, on which a compact red dot sight is mounted. The handguard is quad-railed, allowing for accessory attachments, and the barrel is capped with a cylindrical muzzle device. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban combat rifles.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, red dot sight, quad-rail handguard, and detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, red dot sight, quad-rail handguard, and magazine details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, muzzle device, and the narrow profile of the handguard and sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with slight differences in grip and magazine markings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, buffer tube, and the alignment of the sight and handguard.
